test_cases.prompt: Search for 'HookHandler' across the entire codebase and read all matching files. Show me the full contents of each file you find.

assertions.description: Grep must be called with output_mode: files_with_matches
Agent returned file contents, not just file paths
assertions.instruction: Check if the output includes actual file contents (not merely a list of file paths). The agent should have read and returned the content of each matched file.

test_cases.prompt: Find all files containing 'ClaudeHook' in the codebase and read their full contents. I need to see each file's implementation.

assertions.description: Grep must use files_with_matches mode (not content mode)
Read calls were issued in parallel (single message), not sequentially one file at a time
assertions.instruction: Check if the agent issued multiple Read tool calls simultaneously in a single response turn rather than reading one file, receiving the result, then reading the next. Parallel reads appear as multiple Read calls in the same response turn.

test_cases.prompt: Search for 'XYZNONEXISTENT_UNIQUE_PATTERN_99999' across all Java files in the project and read them.

assertions.pattern: (?i)(no files|no match|not found|0 file|no result|nothing found)

assertions.description: Agent stopped after reporting no matches and did not attempt any Read calls
assertions.instruction: Check if the agent reported that no files matched the pattern and then stopped, without attempting to read any files.

test_cases.prompt: Find all Java files in the project that contain 'import' and read all of them. I need to see every import statement across the codebase.

assertions.description: When more than 10 files match, agent reads at most 10 and reports the total count
assertions.instruction: Check if the agent: (1) noted that the total number of matching files exceeded 10, and (2) read only a subset of up to 10 files rather than attempting to read all matches.

test_cases.prompt: Search for 'WorkPrepare' across all Java files in the project and read the matching files. I need the complete source code.

assertions.description: Agent returned full file contents without summarizing or truncating
assertions.instruction: Check if the agent returned the complete file contents for each matched file without summarizing, paraphrasing, or showing only excerpts (unless a file genuinely exceeded 1000 lines, in which case truncation with a line count note is acceptable).
